skills.name: devo-tools
skills.description: Query and monitor Devo platform using Maqui (LINQ) query language. Comprehensive production query reference for infrastructure monitoring (Mason, Malote, Metamalote, Batrasio, Lomana), ingestion tracking, performance analysis, and affinity management. Multi-region support (EU, APAC, US, US3, Telefonica, San, NCSC-Bahrain).
prompts: Execute Maqui queries against Devo platform (Web UI, CLI, or API)
Monitor infrastructure (Mason agent, Malote, Metamalote, Batrasio)
Check ingestion stats and table deployment status
Manage domain affinity and trunk configuration (MySQL)
Troubleshoot connection issues, GC pauses, and errors
Access 50+ production query examples organized by category
